title: 16PCS Metal Ceiling Hooks 2.9 Inch Multipurpose Vinyl Coated Screw-in Wall Hooks for Hanging Plants, Cups, Utensils, Lights and Stuff Great for Indoor & Outdoor Use
features: Package Include: 16 Pack 2.9 inches(73mm) Vinyl Coated Screw-In Ceiling Hooks, Black Color,The hooks can holds up around 50 pounds（22KG） weight, suitable for interior and exterior use.

Product Size: The dimensions for this ceiling hook is 2.9 inches (73mm) long with 4.8mm screw diameter, whereas 51mm long is the hook and 22mm long is the screw. Drilling a smaller hole is recommended before turning thread

Premium quality construction: Interior steel screw and vinyl coating make these outdoor hooks for hanging durable, robust and anti-rust. White vinyl ceiling hooks seamlessly blend into your home decor.
Functions: Great for hanging cups, mugs, pots, plants, hat,clothes etc in Parlor, Kitchen & Garden, Office

Efficient space saver: Let these Black cup hooks screw in organize and tidy up the living place for a sleek finish look. Each ceiling plant hook bites into ceiling, wall, or wood quickly and safely with its sharp screws and hold them tightly.
description: Product Description Great for Hanging Lights, Plants, Cups, Indoor and Outdoor Stuff These hooks can be used for indoors or outdoors. You can use these ceiling hooks for hanging plants, lights, lanterns, lamps, wind chimes, decorations, mugs, clothes, hats, towel, keys, cup, utensil, or even tools. These all round screw hooks can be used everywhere, in your garden, inside your home or for your closet needs. EASY TO INSTALL
